message:
refactor: Use io::Error::other() and fix minor code style issues

Updates error construction to use the stabilized io::Error::other()
method instead of io::Error::new(ErrorKind::Other, ...). This provides
cleaner syntax for custom error messages.

Also includes minor fixes:
- charmed_log: Adjust log level handling
- lipgloss: Refine style method implementations

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
